response.justification: Wei has over 15 years of software engineering experience with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud infrastructure. Crucially, they possess highly relevant and rare experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, alongside a strong background in testing (TDD, CI/CD) and Java, making them an exceptionally strong match for this Senior Fullstack role.
strengths: Extensive experience with the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker).
Direct, hands-on experience developing AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
Exceptional background in software testing, including TDD advocacy and developing custom testing libraries.
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, which may require a short ramp-up period for this specific framework.
Vitest and Playwright are not explicitly listed, though deep expertise in other testing tools is present.
Some recent roles have tenures of under two years, which may warrant a discussion about long-term commitment.
